sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at rows 24-27, cols 60-63
# Top blue center at cols 25-26, rows 29-30
# Let me try to collect the top blue center by moving to its position

# LEFT x35 to get to cols 25-28, then DOWN x2 to get to rows 26-29
result = action(['LEFT']*35 + ['DOWN']*2)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After LEFT x35, DOWN x2:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'b', 'c', 'g']:
        print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
print("Score:", result.get('score'))
print("Done:", result.get('done'))
print("Level completed:", result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
